ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store where the sales occurred */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the item sold */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the day */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1-7) */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sale (1-12) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sale */,
  "weekend" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sale occurred on a weekend (true/false) */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold for the day */,
  "discount_applied" INTEGER /* Indicates if a discount was applied to the sale */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the promotion applied */,
  "customer_footfall" INTEGER /* Number of customers entering the store on that day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store manager */,
  "store_size" TEXT /* Size of the store (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Store opening hours */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES store_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the supplier */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the item */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Current discount rate if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager ended their role (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales summary */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the item */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the month */,
  "total_units_sold" INTEGER /* Total units sold for the month */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sales summary */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales summary */,
  "average_sales_per_day" REAL /* Average daily sales for the month */,
  "average_units_sold_per_day" INTEGER /* Average daily units sold for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_summary_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_summary_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the item */,
  "sales_growth" REAL /* Percentage growth in sales compared to the previous month */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend */,
  "previous_month_sales" REAL /* Sales amount from the previous month for comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, regional manager, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
